risk_summary: This vulnerability carries Immediate urgency because a public exploit is available for this vulnerability and active exploitation has been observed in the wild.

top_factors.label: a public exploit is available for this vulnerability
active exploitation has been observed in the wild

business_consequence: If exploited, this vulnerability could allow an attacker to gain unauthorised access to a production system, potentially disrupting business operations or exposing sensitive data.
time_horizon: Action should begin within the current working week; escalate if remediation cannot start promptly.
action: Apply the available security update for the affected system. The vendor's recommended remediation: Upgrade xz-utils / liblzma to a version newer than 5.6.0, or downgrade to 5.4.x, on all affected hosts immediately.
mitigation: If the update cannot be applied immediately, restrict network access to the affected service to trusted sources until patching is complete. Note that any temporary measure carries its own trade-offs and must be validated against this specific system before use.

path: public exploit available and active exploitation observed in the wild
asset environment production; technical severity band Critical
production asset with Critical severity → High
exploitation likelihood is High → Immediate regardless of patch status or age

title: XZ Utils Backdoor (liblzma)

technical_detail.solution_text: Upgrade xz-utils / liblzma to a version newer than 5.6.0, or downgrade to 5.4.x, on all affected hosts immediately.
